name: Baby Corn, Bok Choy, & Tofu Stir-Fry--Lowfat
recipeIngredient: Bok choy (4 cups), cut diagonally into 1-inch slices
Firm tofu (3/4 lb), drained and cut into 1-inch chunks
Chili paste with soy beans (1/2 tbsp)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the sesame oil in a wok or 12-inch frying pan.
2. Add ginger and garlic, and cook over medium heat for 30 seconds.
3. Add bok choy and cook until leaves soften and turn deeper green.
4. Add tofu, baby corn, sherry, chili paste, and hoisin sauce.
5. Cook on medium heat, stirring frequently for 2 minutes.
6. In a small bowl, combine water and cornstarch, stirring until smooth.
7. Make a well in the center of the pan with stir-fry ingredients.
8. Add the cornstarch mixture to the well and stir until thickened.
9. Move stir-fry ingredients into the well and coat with sauce.
10. Serve immediately. YIELD: Makes 8 servings (1/2 cup each)
Each serving contains: 89 calories, 6g protein, 3.7g total fat,
11.3g carbohydrates, 0mg cholesterol, 2.6g fiber, 80mg sodium,
99mg calcium
Exchanges: 1/4 fat, 3/8 meat, 1/10 starch, 2 vegetable
